## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] File created or updated at `docs/...`
- [ ] Document renders correctly on GitHub (ToC links, tables, code blocs, Mermaid diagrams)
- [ ] Internal cross-references verified (ADR links, section anchors)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated with entry under correct type (Added / Changed)
- [ ] AI session URL added to PR description (if applicable)
